70	func TestWriteClaudeQuotaAtomicAndMode(t *testing.T) {
71		dir := t.TempDir()
72		path := filepath.Join(dir, "sub", "claude-quota.json")
73	
74		snap := ClaudeQuotaSnapshot{
75			CapturedAt:        time.Date(2026, 4, 12, 12, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC),
76			FiveHourRemaining: 8000,
77			FiveHourLimit:     10000,
78			WeeklyRemaining:   60000,
79			WeeklyLimit:       70000,
80			Source:            "pty",
81		}
82	
83		require.NoError(t, WriteClaudeQuota(path, snap))
84	
85		// Read back and compare.
86		loaded, ok := ReadClaudeQuotaFrom(path)
87		require.True(t, ok)
88		require.NotNil(t, loaded)
89		assert.True(t, loaded.CapturedAt.Equal(snap.CapturedAt))
90		assert.Equal(t, snap.FiveHourRemaining, loaded.FiveHourRemaining)
91		assert.Equal(t, snap.FiveHourLimit, loaded.FiveHourLimit)
92		assert.Equal(t, snap.WeeklyRemaining, loaded.WeeklyRemaining)
93		assert.Equal(t, snap.WeeklyLimit, loaded.WeeklyLimit)
94		assert.Equal(t, snap.Source, loaded.Source)
95	
96		// Verify mode is 0600.
97		info, err := os.Stat(path)
98		require.NoError(t, err)
99		assert.Equal(t, fs.FileMode(0o600), info.Mode().Perm())
100	
101		// No leftover tmp file.
102		_, err = os.Stat(path + ".tmp")
103		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(err), "tmp file should not remain after rename")
104	
105		// Overwriting the same path works (atomic replace).
106		snap.FiveHourRemaining = 100
107		require.NoError(t, WriteClaudeQuota(path, snap))
108		loaded2, ok := ReadClaudeQuotaFrom(path)
109		require.True(t, ok)
110		assert.Equal(t, 100, loaded2.FiveHourRemaining)
111	}

451		ok := MarkClaudeQuotaExhaustedFromMessage("You're out of extra usage · resets May 7, 12am (America/New_York)", now)
452		require.True(t, ok)
453	
454		snap, present := ReadClaudeQuotaFrom(path)
455		require.True(t, present)
456		dec := DecideClaudeQuotaRouting(snap, now, DefaultClaudeQuotaStaleAfter)
457		assert.False(t, dec.PreferClaude)
458		assert.True(t, dec.Fresh)
459		assert.Contains(t, dec.Reason, "exhausted")
460		assert.Contains(t, dec.Reason, "weekly-all")
461	}

463	func TestReadClaudeQuotaRoutingDecisionDefaultPath(t *testing.T) {
464		dir := t.TempDir()
465		path := filepath.Join(dir, "claude-quota.json")
466		t.Setenv(claudeQuotaCacheEnv, path)
467	
468		now := time.Date(2026, 4, 12, 12, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC)
469	
470		// No snapshot: fall back.
471		d := ReadClaudeQuotaRoutingDecision(now, DefaultClaudeQuotaStaleAfter)
472		assert.False(t, d.PreferClaude)
473		assert.False(t, d.SnapshotPresent)
474	
475		// Write a fresh snapshot with headroom.
476		require.NoError(t, WriteClaudeQuota(path, ClaudeQuotaSnapshot{
477			CapturedAt:        now.Add(-30 * time.Second),
478			FiveHourRemaining: 9000,
479			FiveHourLimit:     10000,
480			WeeklyRemaining:   65000,
481			WeeklyLimit:       70000,
482			Source:            "pty",
483			Account:           testClaudeAccount(),
484		}))
485		d = ReadClaudeQuotaRoutingDecision(now, DefaultClaudeQuotaStaleAfter)
486		assert.True(t, d.PreferClaude)
487		assert.True(t, d.Fresh)
488		assert.True(t, d.SnapshotPresent)
489	}

491	func TestRefreshClaudeQuotaAsyncWritesCache(t *testing.T) {
492		dir := t.TempDir()
493		path := filepath.Join(dir, "claude-quota.json")
494		t.Setenv(claudeQuotaCacheEnv, path)
495	
496		var wg sync.WaitGroup
497		wg.Add(1)
498		captureCalled := false
499		capture := func() (ClaudeQuotaSnapshot, error) {
500			defer wg.Done()
501			captureCalled = true
502			return ClaudeQuotaSnapshot{
503				CapturedAt:        time.Date(2026, 4, 12, 12, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC),
504				FiveHourRemaining: 1234,
505				FiveHourLimit:     10000,
506				WeeklyRemaining:   55000,
507				WeeklyLimit:       70000,
508				Source:            "pty",
509			}, nil
510		}
511	
512		RefreshClaudeQuotaAsync(capture)
513		wg.Wait()
514	
515		// Poll briefly for the file to land (goroutine writes after capture returns).
516		deadline := time.Now().Add(2 * time.Second)
517		var loaded *ClaudeQuotaSnapshot
518		for time.Now().Before(deadline) {
519			if s, ok := ReadClaudeQuotaFrom(path); ok {
520				loaded = s
521				break
522			}
523			time.Sleep(10 * time.Millisecond)
524		}
525		require.True(t, captureCalled)
526		require.NotNil(t, loaded, "expected cache file to be written")
527		assert.Equal(t, 1234, loaded.FiveHourRemaining)
528		assert.Equal(t, "pty", loaded.Source)
529	}

531	func TestRefreshClaudeQuotaAsyncNilCapture(t *testing.T) {
532		// Nil capture is a no-op and must not panic.
533		RefreshClaudeQuotaAsync(nil)
534	}
535	
536	func TestRefreshClaudeQuotaAsyncCaptureErrorLeavesCache(t *testing.T) {
537		dir := t.TempDir()
538		path := filepath.Join(dir, "claude-quota.json")
539		t.Setenv(claudeQuotaCacheEnv, path)
540	
541		var wg sync.WaitGroup
542		wg.Add(1)
543		capture := func() (ClaudeQuotaSnapshot, error) {
544			defer wg.Done()
545			return ClaudeQuotaSnapshot{}, assert.AnError
546		}
547		RefreshClaudeQuotaAsync(capture)
548		wg.Wait()
549		// Give the goroutine a moment in case it would (wrongly) write.
550		time.Sleep(20 * time.Millisecond)
551		_, err := os.Stat(path)
552		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(err), "cache must not be created when capture errors")
553	}

package claude

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"runtime"
	"testing"
	"time"

	"github.com/easel/fizeau/internal/harnesses/ptyquota"
	"github.com/easel/fizeau/internal/pty/cassette"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
)

func TestParseClaudeModelsAndReasoning(t *testing.T) {
	text := "Model: 'sonnet' or 'opus' or 'claude-sonnet-4-6'\n--effort <level> (low, medium, high, xhigh, max)"
	require.Equal(t, []string{"claude-sonnet-4-6", "sonnet-4.6", "sonnet", "opus"}, parseClaudeModels(text))
	require.Equal(t, []string{"low", "medium", "high", "xhigh", "max"}, parseClaudeReasoningLevels(text))
}

func TestParseClaudeModelsFromTUIVersionLabels(t *testing.T) {
	text := "Select model\n> Opus 4.7\n  Sonnet 4.6\n  Claude Haiku 5.5\n  claude-opus-4-8\n"

	require.Equal(t, []string{"claude-opus-4-8", "opus-4.8", "opus-4.7", "sonnet-4.6", "haiku-5.5", "opus", "sonnet", "haiku"}, parseClaudeModels(text))
}

func TestResolveClaudeFamilyAliasUsesLatestDiscoveredVersion(t *testing.T) {
	snapshot := defaultClaudeModelDiscovery()
	snapshot.Models = []string{"opus", "opus-4.6", "opus-4.10", "opus-4.7", "sonnet-4.6"}

	require.Equal(t, "opus-4.10", resolveClaudeFamilyAlias("opus", snapshot))
	require.Equal(t, "sonnet-4.6", resolveClaudeFamilyAlias("sonnet", snapshot))
	require.Equal(t, "opus-4.7", resolveClaudeFamilyAlias("opus-4.7", snapshot))
	require.Equal(t, "gpt-5.4", resolveClaudeFamilyAlias("gpt-5.4", snapshot))
}

func TestReadClaudeReasoningFromHelp(t *testing.T) {
	if runtime.GOOS == "windows" {
		t.Skip("shell-backed helper requires Unix script")
	}
	dir := t.TempDir()
	script := filepath.Join(dir, "fake-claude")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(script, []byte(`#!/bin/sh
cat <<'EOF'
Usage: claude [options]
  --effort <level>  Effort level for the current session (low, medium, high, xhigh, max)
EOF
`), 0o700))

	levels, err := readClaudeReasoningFromHelp(context.Background(), script)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Equal(t, []string{"low", "medium", "high", "xhigh", "max"}, levels)
}

func TestReadClaudeModelDiscoveryViaPTYRecordsDiscovery(t *testing.T) {
	if runtime.GOOS == "windows" {
		t.Skip("shell-backed PTY probes require Unix PTY support")
	}
	dir := t.TempDir()
	script := filepath.Join(dir, "fake-claude")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(script, []byte(`#!/bin/sh
printf '❯ '
IFS= read line
printf '/model\r\nSelect model\r\n> Sonnet 4.6\r\n  Opus 4.7\r\n  claude-sonnet-4-6\r\n❯ '
sleep 1
`), 0o700))
	cassetteDir := filepath.Join(dir, "cassette")

	require.NoError(t, err)

	require.Contains(t, snapshot.ReasoningLevels, "xhigh")

	replayed, err := ReadClaudeModelDiscoveryFromCassette(cassetteDir)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Equal(t, snapshot.Models, replayed.Models)
	reader, err := cassette.Open(cassetteDir)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.NotNil(t, reader.Discovery())
	require.NotEmpty(t, reader.Discovery().CapturedAt)
	require.Equal(t, ClaudeModelDiscoveryFreshnessWindow.String(), reader.Discovery().FreshnessWindow)
	require.Contains(t, reader.Discovery().StalenessBehavior, "authenticated PTY refresh")

func TestReadClaudeModelDiscoveryViaPTYRejectsEmptyMenu(t *testing.T) {
	if runtime.GOOS == "windows" {
		t.Skip("shell-backed PTY probes require Unix PTY support")
	}
	dir := t.TempDir()
	script := filepath.Join(dir, "fake-claude")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(script, []byte(`#!/bin/sh
printf '❯ '
IFS= read line
printf '/model\r\nNo model picker\r\n'
sleep 5
`), 0o700))
	cassetteDir := filepath.Join(dir, "cassette")

	_, err := ReadClaudeModelDiscoveryViaPTY(200*time.Millisecond, WithQuotaPTYCommand(script), WithQuotaPTYCassetteDir(cassetteDir))

	require.Equal(t, ptyquota.StatusError, ptyquota.ErrorStatus(err))

package claude

import (
	"errors"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"runtime"
	"testing"
	"time"

	"github.com/easel/fizeau/internal/harnesses/ptyquota"
	"github.com/easel/fizeau/internal/pty/cassette"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
)

func TestReadClaudeQuotaViaPTYWaitsForRequiredUsageSections(t *testing.T) {
	if runtime.GOOS == "windows" {
		t.Skip("shell-backed PTY probes require Unix PTY support")
	}
	dir := t.TempDir()
	script := filepath.Join(dir, "claude")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(script, []byte(`#!/bin/sh
printf 'Claude Max\r\n❯ '
IFS= read line
printf 'Current session\r\n4%% used\r\nResets 4pm (UTC)\r\n'
printf 'Current week (all models)\r\n'
sleep 5
`), 0o700))
	cassetteDir := filepath.Join(dir, "cassette")

	windows, account, err := readClaudeQuotaViaPTY(200*time.Millisecond, WithQuotaPTYCommand(script), WithQuotaPTYCassetteDir(cassetteDir))
	require.Error(t, err)
	require.Empty(t, windows)
	require.Nil(t, account)
	require.Equal(t, ptyquota.StatusError, ptyquota.ErrorStatus(err))
	require.Contains(t, err.Error(), "timed out")
	_, statErr := os.Stat(filepath.Join(cassetteDir, cassette.ManifestFile))
	require.True(t, errors.Is(statErr, os.ErrNotExist), "partial usage output should not promote a cassette")
}

func TestReadClaudeQuotaViaPTYAcceptsSonnetOnlyWeeklyUsage(t *testing.T) {
	if runtime.GOOS == "windows" {
		t.Skip("shell-backed PTY probes require Unix PTY support")
	}
	dir := t.TempDir()
	script := filepath.Join(dir, "fake-claude")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(script, []byte(`#!/bin/sh
printf 'Claude Max\r\n❯ '
IFS= read line
cat <<'EOF'
Current session
4% used
Resets 4pm (UTC)
Current week (Sonnet only)
10% used
Resets Monday (UTC)
EOF
sleep 1
`), 0o700))

	windows, account, err := readClaudeQuotaViaPTY(2*time.Second, WithQuotaPTYCommand(script))
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.NotNil(t, account)
	require.True(t, hasQuotaWindow(windows, "session"))
	require.True(t, hasQuotaWindow(windows, "weekly-sonnet"))
}

func TestReadClaudeQuotaViaPTYRecordsEvidenceFreshness(t *testing.T) {
	if runtime.GOOS == "windows" {
		t.Skip("shell-backed PTY probes require Unix PTY support")
	}
	dir := t.TempDir()
	script := filepath.Join(dir, "claude")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(script, []byte(`#!/bin/sh
if [ "$1" = "--version" ]; then
  printf 'claude-test 1.2.3\n'
  exit 0
fi
printf 'Claude Max\r\n❯ '
IFS= read line
cat <<'EOF'
Current session
4% used
Resets 4pm (UTC)
Current week (all models)
10% used
Resets Monday (UTC)
EOF
sleep 1
`), 0o700))
	cassetteDir := filepath.Join(dir, "cassette")

	_, _, err := readClaudeQuotaViaPTY(2*time.Second, WithQuotaPTYCommand(script), WithQuotaPTYCassetteDir(cassetteDir))
	require.NoError(t, err)
	reader, err := cassette.Open(cassetteDir)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Equal(t, "claude-test 1.2.3", reader.Manifest().Harness.BinaryVersion)
	require.Equal(t, "Claude Max", reader.Quota().AccountClass)
	require.NotEmpty(t, reader.Quota().CapturedAt)
	require.Equal(t, defaultClaudeQuotaStaleAfter.String(), reader.Quota().FreshnessWindow)
	require.Contains(t, reader.Quota().StalenessBehavior, "automatic routing")
}

func TestReadClaudeQuotaViaPTYRejectsMissingAccountPlan(t *testing.T) {
	if runtime.GOOS == "windows" {
		t.Skip("shell-backed PTY probes require Unix PTY support")
	}
	dir := t.TempDir()
	script := filepath.Join(dir, "fake-claude")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(script, []byte(`#!/bin/sh
printf 'Claude Code\r\n❯ '
IFS= read line
cat <<'EOF'
Current session
4% used
Resets 4pm (UTC)
Current week (all models)
10% used
Resets Monday (UTC)
EOF
sleep 1
`), 0o700))
	cassetteDir := filepath.Join(dir, "cassette")

	windows, account, err := readClaudeQuotaViaPTY(2*time.Second, WithQuotaPTYCommand(script), WithQuotaPTYCassetteDir(cassetteDir))
	require.Error(t, err)
	require.Empty(t, windows)
	require.Nil(t, account)
	require.Contains(t, err.Error(), "missing account plan")
	_, statErr := os.Stat(filepath.Join(cassetteDir, cassette.ManifestFile))
	require.True(t, errors.Is(statErr, os.ErrNotExist), "account-less usage output should not promote a cassette")
}

15	// claudeQuotaSnapshot captures Claude's current-quota headroom as absolute
16	// token/message counts. It is written to a durable per-user cache by an
17	// asynchronous capture path and read by foreground routing consumers.
18	//

20	// QuotaSignal: foreground routing needs concrete numbers to reason about
21	// 5-hour / weekly headroom without invoking PTY capture inline.
